message:
fix(tmux): Add delay before Enter to prevent key loss

Agent CLIs like Codex and Gemini can lose the Enter keypress when text
is pasted quickly due to input buffering in the terminal. Adding a
50ms delay before sending C-m (Enter) ensures the pasted text is fully
processed before the command is executed.

This fixes issues where commands would be pasted but not executed,
requiring manual intervention to press Enter again.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
